channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Explosion, Gunfire In Pakistan's Karachi, 3 Army Rangers Dead: Local Media

media:content.media:description: Special units such as the Rapid Response Force and police commandos were dispatched to the scene

item.description: At least two people were injured and taken to the hospital, news agency AFP reported, citing a statement from the Edhi Foundation, which provides emergency assistance in Pakistan.
item.content:encoded: At least two people were injured and taken to the hospital, news agency AFP reported, citing a statement from the Edhi Foundation, which provides emergency assistance in Pakistan.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: Officials Say Death Count From Venezuela Earthquake Rises To 1,430

media:content.media:description: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake in Venezuela Updates: The first earthquake had a magnitude of 7.2

item.description: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

item.title: Challenges That Lie Ahead For The US-Israel-Lebanon Deal

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu said displaced Lebanese civilians will not be allowed to return home to occupied areas.

item.description: Lebanon and Israel, under US sponsorship, signed an agreement on Friday hoping to end hostilities between them, but experts say it does not guarantee Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Lebanon and Israel, under US sponsorship, signed an agreement on Friday hoping to end hostilities between them, but experts say it does not guarantee Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes May Have Affected Nearly 7 Million People: UN

media:content.media:description: The national death count stands at 920, while people remain trapped.

item.description: Entire buildings have crumbled in La Guaira, located to the north of Caracas, following devastating twin tremors of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Entire buildings have crumbled in La Guaira, located to the north of Caracas, following devastating twin tremors of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 on Wednesday.

item.title: Many Similarities In Leadership Style: US Envoy Says PM Modi, Trump Think Alike

media:content.media:description: Sergio Gor said the president holds both PM Modi and India in high regard

item.description: US Ambassador to India, Sergio Gor dismissed the idea that there are strains in bilateral relations and said that the close personal relationship between both leaders is the cornerstone of India-US ties.
item.content:encoded: US Ambassador to India, Sergio Gor dismissed the idea that there are strains in bilateral relations and said that the close personal relationship between both leaders is the cornerstone of India-US ties.

item.title: Schools In US To Introduce AI-Powered Humanoid Robots As Teaching Partners
item.description: While school officials have described the initiative as a step toward the future of learning.
item.content:encoded: While school officials have described the initiative as a step toward the future of learning.

item.title: 10,000 Vespas Swarm Rome's Historic Sites To Mark Scooter's 80th Anniversary

media:content.media:description: Piaggio has sold about 20 million Vespas worldwide since 1946

item.description: Vespa-borne visitors converged on the Eternal City's cobblestone streets to celebrate a brand they likewise view as timeless. If for only a day, Ferrari and Ducati were forgotten as the little Vespa left them in its dust.
item.content:encoded: Vespa-borne visitors converged on the Eternal City's cobblestone streets to celebrate a brand they likewise view as timeless. If for only a day, Ferrari and Ducati were forgotten as the little Vespa left them in its dust.

item.title: MacBook, iPad Price Hikes Only The Beginning: Here's What You May Pay Next

media:content.media:description: Apple's steep price hikes in Macs and iPads are spotlighting the chip crunch.

item.description: An unprecedented AI data centre boom is triggering a massive $670 billion surge in the global memory market, expanding it to $890 billion by 2026, according to Morgan Stanley.
item.content:encoded: An unprecedented AI data centre boom is triggering a massive $670 billion surge in the global memory market, expanding it to $890 billion by 2026, according to Morgan Stanley.

item.title: Collapsed Buildings, Debris: Satellite Pics Show Impact Of Venezuela Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Satellite imagery confirms the widespread structural damage caused by the two deadly earthquakes

item.description: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.
item.content:encoded: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.

item.title: "Playhouse For Predator": Epstein Used 'Fake' Science Office As Prison Escape

media:content.media:description: The Florida Science Foundation was presented as an organisation focused on supporting research

item.description: The Florida Science Foundation was presented as a legitimate organisation focused on supporting research. But a review by The Telegraph of more than 1,000 documents connected to the company painted a different picture.
item.content:encoded: The Florida Science Foundation was presented as a legitimate organisation focused on supporting research. But a review by The Telegraph of more than 1,000 documents connected to the company painted a different picture.

item.title: Small Aircraft Crashes That Rocked Beijing Over The Past 20 Years

media:content.media:description: A small plane crashed into a Beijing skyscraper, killing one.

item.description: An aircraft about the size of a car flew into the tallest building in Beijing on Friday.
item.content:encoded: An aircraft about the size of a car flew into the tallest building in Beijing on Friday.

item.title: Small Plane Crash At Beijing's Tallest Building Kills Pilot, Injures 13

media:content.media:description: Images and videos on social media appeared to show debris from a small aircraft near the skyscraper.

item.description: It was unclear whether the injured were in the building or were hit by debris, but the statement said they were receiving treatment.
item.content:encoded: It was unclear whether the injured were in the building or were hit by debris, but the statement said they were receiving treatment.

item.title: "Blatant Violation Of Peace Deal": Iran Slams US After Strikes

media:content.media:description: Iran lashed out at the attacks after its Revolutionary Guards launched its own retaliatory strikes.

item.description: Iran has warned vessels not to enter or leave the Gulf through the strait without permission, but ships have continued to move, some using a route not authorised by Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Iran has warned vessels not to enter or leave the Gulf through the strait without permission, but ships have continued to move, some using a route not authorised by Tehran.

item.title: Oil Tanker Hit By "Unknown Projectile" In Hormuz As Iran, US Exchange Fire

media:content.media:description: The vessel sustained damage to their bridge.

item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards announced on Saturday that they had attacked American positions in the Gulf after US strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Iran's Revolutionary Guards announced on Saturday that they had attacked American positions in the Gulf after US strikes on Iran.

item.title: PM Modi Meets World's Oldest Living Land Animal During Seychelles Visit

media:content.media:description: Despite his very old age, Jonathan is in great health condition.

item.description: This visit is expected to consolidate cooperation between India and Seychelles in areas of maritime security, blue economy, climate resilience and capacity building.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1119212/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>This visit is expected to consolidate cooperation between India and Seychelles in areas of maritime security, blue economy, climate resilience and capacity building.

item.title: Germany To Decide On Mandatory Military Service Amid Soldier Shortage

media:content.media:description: Compulsory conscription would not apply to all men who turn 18 in any given year.

item.description: Faced with a growing threat from Russia and an unpredictable United States, Berlin is looking to revamp its army and has committed to increase its troop strength to at least 260,000 soldiers -- up from the current 185,000 -- by 2035.
item.content:encoded: Faced with a growing threat from Russia and an unpredictable United States, Berlin is looking to revamp its army and has committed to increase its troop strength to at least 260,000 soldiers -- up from the current 185,000 -- by 2035.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquake Crisis Tests Legitimacy Of Delcy Rodriguez Regime

media:content.media:description: Rodriguez's administration has raced to rescue victims, restore infrastructure

item.description: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela on Wednesday have killed nearly 1,000 people and more than 3,300.
item.content:encoded: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela on Wednesday have killed nearly 1,000 people and more than 3,300.

item.title: Small Plane Crashes Into Beijing's Tallest Building, Debris Falls From Sky

media:content.media:description: No official comment from the company or Chinese authorities was available immediately.

item.description: Videos and images also showed a portion of the building damaged, as well as a tail section of the plane and the broken window of a cab on the ground.
item.content:encoded: Videos and images also showed a portion of the building damaged, as well as a tail section of the plane and the broken window of a cab on the ground.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | For The Great Passport Debate, A 'Common-Sense' Cure - By Shashi Tharoor
item.description: There is a gap between legal theory and the practical realities of a passport. But an easy fix can resolve this manufactured crisis.
item.content:encoded: There is a gap between legal theory and the practical realities of a passport. But an easy fix can resolve this manufactured crisis.

item.title: Earthquake Of Magnitude 5.5 Hits Pakistan, No Damage Reported

media:content.media:description: This comes hours after an earthquake of magnitude 5.3 struck Pakistan on Friday evening.

item.description: There were no immediate reports of deaths or damage to property.
item.content:encoded: There were no immediate reports of deaths or damage to property.
